'''yamuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yokelet|yokelet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-m-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yokelet|yokelet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yamuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæmizith|yæmizith]] || [[word:yæmizij|yæmizij]] || [[word:yæmizish|yæmizish]] || [[word:yæmizi|yæmizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yamumuzuth|yamumuzuth]] || [[word:yamumuzuj|yamumuzuj]] || [[word:yamumuzush|yamumuzush]] || [[word:yamumuzu|yamumuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yamuzuth|yamuzuth]] || [[word:yamuzuj|yamuzuj]] || [[word:yamuzush|yamuzush]] || [[word:yamuzu|yamuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yamufzuth|yamufzuth]] || [[word:yamufzuj|yamufzuj]] || [[word:yamufzush|yamufzush]] || [[word:yamufzuf|yamufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yamuzuthu|yamuzuthu]] || [[word:yamuzuju|yamuzuju]] || [[word:yamuzushu|yamuzushu]] || [[word:yamuzuku|yamuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yamuzuth|yamuzuth]] || [[word:yamuzuj|yamuzuj]] || [[word:yamuzush|yamuzush]] || [[word:yamuzu|yamuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yamuzuthul|yamuzuthul]] || [[word:yamuzujul|yamuzujul]] || [[word:yamuzushul|yamuzushul]] || [[word:yamuzukul|yamuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yamuzuthuthu|yamuzuthuthu]] || [[word:yamuzujuju|yamuzujuju]] || [[word:yamuzushushu|yamuzushushu]] || [[word:yamuzuku|yamuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yamuzuthun|yamuzuthun]] || [[word:yamuzujun|yamuzujun]] || [[word:yamuzushun|yamuzushun]] || [[word:yamuzukun|yamuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yamuzuthuoro|yamuzuthuoro]] || [[word:yamuzujuoro|yamuzujuoro]] || [[word:yamuzushuoro|yamuzushuoro]] || [[word:yamuzukuoro|yamuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
